# A*

Heuristic pathfinding that expands the frontier node with the lowest estimated total cost.

<div class="algorithm-meta">
  <span>Search</span>
  <span>pathfinding, heuristic, graph</span>
  <span>Mermaid</span>
</div>

## Flowchart

```mermaid
flowchart TD
    A[Initialize open set with start node] --> B[Select node with lowest f-score]
    B --> C{Goal reached?}
    C -- Yes --> D[Reconstruct path]
    C -- No --> E[Expand neighbors]
    E --> F{Better path to neighbor?}
    F -- Yes --> G[Update g-score, f-score, and parent]
    G --> H[Insert or refresh neighbor in open set]
    H --> B
    F -- No --> B
```


## Notes

- Uses f(n) = g(n) + h(n) to rank candidates.
- With an admissible heuristic, A* returns an optimal shortest path.
